TextView.android:text: To record background toasts, please follow these steps:\n\n1. Find 'NotiVault Toast Recorder' in the accessibility service list and turn it on.

Note: If the setting is greyed out with a 'Restricted setting' warning:

• Go to your phone's Home screen, long-press the 'Notification Vault' app icon, and tap 'App info'.
• Tap the three-dots menu in the top-right and select 'Allow restricted settings'.
• Return here or go to accessibility settings and enable 'NotiVault Toast Recorder'.
